name: mostPMTempShutdownWakeupTimeout
title: mostPMTempShutdownWakeupTimeout
description: As described in the MOST specification in the chapter "Over-Temperature Management", the PowerMaster may try to wake-up the MOST ring, after a temperature shutdown, after a certain time. This function sets the timeout duration.

By setting the "over temperature status" in the device of the PowerMaster, the wake-up attempt will not be performed after the timeout. After resetting the "over temperature status" the application has to perform the wake-up, if necessary.
